description: PERFORM THRU with GO TO: PARA-B jumps to PARA-C, skipping ADD 100.
notes: PERFORM PARA-A THRU PARA-C. PARA-A adds 1, PARA-B adds 10 then GO TO PARA-C (skips ADD 100), PARA-C adds 1000. Total: 1 + 10 + 1000 = 1011. Engine uses _thru_goto mechanism to skip to target paragraph within THRU range.
